case_title: WENNIE JI VS. ENERGY REAL ESTATE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,300.00 FILED BY JI, WENNIE AS TO DEFENDANT ENERGY REAL ESTATE, INC. DBA STAR PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROGER EAGLETON--OFFICER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JI, WENNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ENERGY REAL ESTATE, INC. DBA STAR PROPERTY MANAGEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
